description_for_human: Banking & Payment Gateway API for Cameroon — COBAC compliant. Access accounts, payments, credit scores, mobile money, virtual cards, merchant tools, and more.
description_for_model: Access Cameroon banking and payment services via the Kang Open Banking platform. Capabilities include: AISP (account information), PISP (payment initiation), Payment Gateway (charges via MoMo/Card/USSD/PayPal, payouts, refunds, disputes, settlements, payment links, subscriptions, split payments), credit scoring (CrediQ), mobile money (MTN, Orange Money), virtual cards, loans (apply/approve/disburse/repay), savings accounts, double-entry ledger, merchant registration and KYB, webhook management, KYC/compliance, ISO 20022 & SWIFT messaging, IBAN/BIC/RIB validation, WooCommerce integration, and consumer tools (Piggy Bank, Njangi). XAF currency native. OAuth 2.0 with PKCE, mTLS, and FAPI 1.0 Advanced support.
